title: Home Detective VR - Immersive Edition
description:
Note: This is the Immersive Edition, which uses a beautiful virtual apartment instead of Mixed Reality.



As a work-from-home detective, the crime scene is overlaid onto your living room, leaving you free to explore and find clues. Use the patent-pending Residual Heat Scanner to detect the criminals' recent movements, and then dust for fingerprints or try to find evidence left behind. With your wits, and your trusty sidekick Steve Dobbins' snarky comments, you're sure to get to the bottom of these confusing crimes.
description_short: With hi-tech tools, and snarky comments from your holographic assistant Steve, it's up to you to explore the crime scenes, piece together the clues, and find the perpetrator!
